basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Kalikiri – PGT and TGT – 5 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of PGT and TGT. Candidates with B.Ed, M.Ed Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Sainik School Kalikiri official website sskal.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognised institution with B.Ed. component, Master Degree with B.Ed. from NCTE recognised institution, Three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed from NCTE recognised institution, Four years Integrated degree including B.Ed. component, Qualified in CTET Paper-II

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for PGT and TGT Posts
